title: Lawyer Referral Services * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Lawyer Referral Services * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adolescents Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE BAR MILITARY ASSISTANCE PANEL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers a referral panel that lists lawyers willing to provide volunteer legal assistance (pro bono) primarily related to the Servicemembers' Civil Relief Act (SCRA), which provides additional legal protection to persons entering or called to active duty in the US Armed Forces. Many volunteer lawyers also assist with family law, consumer/credit law, real property/landlord-tenant law, and estate planning issues. 16037 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Active military personnel and their dependents in need of legal help, immediately before, during, and after deployment Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 684-3763 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE BAR MILITARY ASSISTANCE PANEL
